scripts.postbuild:
rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/easy-multiplication && cp -r build/. dist/easy-multiplication/ && printf '/	/easy-multiplication/	302
/easy-multiplication	/easy-multiplication/	301
/easy-multiplication/static/*	/easy-multiplication/static/:splat	200
/easy-multiplication/*	/easy-multiplication/index.html	200
' > dist/_redirects
